info.title: Checkmate API
info.description: Generated from Zod validation schemas. Source of truth: server/src/validation/*.ts

tags.name: auth
tags.description: Sign up, log in, password reset, and the authenticated user's profile.

tags.name: monitors
tags.description: Configure and inspect monitors (HTTP, port, ping, hardware, docker, game, gRPC) for the caller's team.

tags.name: checks
tags.description: Individual monitoring check results, including history, summaries, and bulk deletes.

tags.name: geo-checks
tags.description: Geographic check results for monitors with multi-region probing enabled.

tags.name: incidents
tags.description: Downtime incidents derived from monitor state changes, including filtering and CSV export.

tags.name: notifications
tags.description: Notification channels (email, webhook, Slack, Discord, PagerDuty, Matrix, Teams, Telegram, Pushover, Twilio) and test alerts.

tags.name: maintenance-window
tags.description: Scheduled maintenance windows during which monitors do not generate incidents or alerts.

tags.name: status-page
tags.description: Public status pages, their configuration, and the monitors they expose.

tags.name: queue
tags.description: Background job queue introspection and admin actions (admin/superadmin).

tags.name: diagnostic
tags.description: System diagnostics for the running server (admin/superadmin).

tags.name: logs
tags.description: Application logs for the running server (admin/superadmin).

example.name: Marketing site
example.description: Production marketing site monitored from the EU region

post.summary: Register a new user (first user becomes superadmin)
Reset password using a recovery token

get.summary: Check whether a superadmin user exists
List all users (admin/superadmin)
Get a user by id
Aggregate check summary for the caller's team
List checks across the team

delete.summary: Delete all checks for the team (admin/superadmin)

get.summary: List checks for a monitor
Get system diagnostics (admin/superadmin)
Get geo check results for a monitor
List incidents for the caller's team
Incident summary for the caller's team
Get an incident by id
Get application logs (admin/superadmin)

post.summary: Create one or more maintenance windows

get.summary: List maintenance windows for the caller's team
List maintenance windows for a monitor
Get a maintenance window by id
List monitors for the caller's team
List team monitors with their most recent checks (paginated)
List monitor groups for the caller's team
Get uptime details for a monitor
Get hardware metrics detail for a monitor
Get PageSpeed detail for a monitor
Get geo check results for a monitor

post.summary: Toggle pause state for a monitor

get.summary: Get SSL certificate info for a monitor
Export all team monitors as JSON
List supported game-server types
Get a monitor by id

post.description: Create a notification channel of any supported type. The `type` field discriminates the body shape.

post.summary: Send a test alert through every notification channel for the team
Send a test alert through a single notification channel

get.summary: List notification channels for the caller's team
Get a notification channel by id
List queued monitor jobs (admin/superadmin)
Get queue runtime metrics (admin/superadmin)
Get queue metrics across all monitors (admin/superadmin)
Get application settings

post.summary: Send a test email using current SMTP settings (admin/superadmin)

get.summary: List status pages for the caller's team

post.summary: Create a status page (logo upload optional)

put.summary: Update a status page (logo upload optional)

get.summary: Get a public status page by its URL slug
